name: ExtensionClinicalUseDefinition_Interaction
title: R5: Specifics for when this is an interaction (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ClinicalUseDefinition.interaction` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ClinicalUseDefinition.interaction` 0..1 `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ClinicalUseDefinition.interaction` 0..1 `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ClinicalUseDefinition.interaction` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `ClinicalUseDefinition` is not mapped.
Element `ClinicalUseDefinition.interaction` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
